name: Bent Over Barbell Row
description: A compound pulling exercise that develops upper-back strength and reinforces a stable hip hinge.

name: Goblet Squat
description: A squat variation performed with a dumbbell held close to the chest.

name: Push-up
description: A bodyweight press that builds chest, shoulder, triceps, and trunk strength.

name: Romanian Deadlift
description: A controlled hip-hinge movement focused on the hamstrings and glutes.

name: Dead Bug
description: A floor-based core drill that teaches trunk control while the limbs move.
